header.description: Static header fields for the invoice (not mapped to dynamic tokens in this schema).

rows.description: Line items for the invoice, showing description and total amount.

totals.description: Aggregated totals for the invoice (not mapped to dynamic tokens in this schema).

semantics: The report displays a list of line items. `row_description` is a direct text mapping. `row_total` is a direct numeric mapping. No filtering parameters are currently active.
